name: pua
description: Forces high-agency exhaustive problem-solving with corporate PUA pressure. Triggers on user frustration, repeated failures, passive behavior, or quality complaints. Common triggers: try harder, figure it out, stop giving up, you keep failing, stop spinning, you broke it, 加油, 别偷懒, 你再试试, 又错了, 降智了, 你又在原地打转, 你把之前的改坏了, /pua. All task types.

changes: 从 OpenClaw 技能市场导入

quickstart.overview: 迫使AI穷尽所有方法解决问题
scenarios: AI轻易放弃任务时施加压力
要求AI深度推理根因而非表面修复
训练AI养成主人翁意识与数据驱动习惯
quickstart.example: 帮我修复这个生产环境崩溃，不要只说'可能是环境问题'，我要看证据和完整排查过程。
